# fluxLab.dev — Full Context for LLMs

> Kyiv-based software development outsourcing company and product studio. Custom web & mobile development, dedicated teams, staff augmentation. 46K+ users, 800+ companies.

## Company Overview

fluxLab.dev is a software development outsourcing company and product studio based in Kyiv, Ukraine. We combine two strengths: we build and operate our own SaaS products (6 live products, 46K+ users), and we help clients build theirs using the same battle-tested stack and processes. Every architecture decision, deployment pipeline, and optimization we recommend has been proven in production on our own products first.

### Why Companies Outsource to fluxLab.dev

1. **Product builders, not just coders** — We think in user flows and business metrics, not just tickets. Our own products serve 46K+ users, so we understand what "production-ready" actually means.
2. **Senior-level team** — Small team of experienced developers (8+ years average). No juniors rotated through your project.
3. **Full ownership** — One team from design to deployment. No hand-offs, no gaps, no miscommunication.
4. **European timezone** — Kyiv, Ukraine (GMT+2/+3). 6-8 hours of overlap with US East Coast, full overlap with EU.
5. **Competitive rates** — Senior developers at Eastern European pricing. Dedicated teams from $8K/month.
6. **Transparent process** — Shared repos, weekly demos, direct Slack access. You see every commit and decision.
7. **Fast delivery** — 8-week MVP cycle from idea to paying customers.
8. **Battle-tested stack** — React, Next.js, Go, Node.js, PostgreSQL — same stack powering our 46K+ user products.

### Services

**Development Outsourcing**
Dedicated development teams of 2-5 senior developers embedded in your workflow. Ideal for long-term product development and ongoing feature work. Starting from $8K/month.

**Staff Augmentation**
Individual senior developers who plug into your existing team. Perfect for filling skill gaps fast. From $4K/month per developer.

**Custom Software Development**
End-to-end development of web and mobile applications. Fixed scope, clear milestones, predictable budget. Best for well-defined products with a known deadline. Starting from $15K.

**Technical Consulting**
Expert guidance on architecture, technology choices, and best practices. Includes architecture review, technology assessment, performance audit, and security analysis.

## Products in Detail (Proof of Expertise)

### Jobber — AI-Powered Job Application Tracker
- URL: https://jobber.fluxlab.dev
- Status: Active (launched January 2025)
- Users: 15,300 | Companies: 210
- Description: Personal job search management platform. Chrome extension imports jobs from any website. AI (Claude) parses job details via layered approach (JSON-LD, DOM, LLM). Resume builder with AI-generated summaries. Cover letter generation. Application tracking with list and Kanban views. Analytics: funnel visualization, time-in-stage, resume effectiveness, source performance.
- Tech: Go (chi, pgx), Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Hetzner Cloud, Caddy
- AI: Claude API (Haiku for parsing, Sonnet for generation)

### EFluxCom — Smart Energy Management
- URL: https://efluxcom.com
- Status: Active (launched March 2024)
- Users: 12,400 | Companies: 85
- Description: Comprehensive energy management system for monitoring, analyzing, and optimizing power consumption. AI engine analyzes patterns and recommends load-shifting strategies cutting costs by up to 30%.
- Tech: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, AWS
- Client result: "Reduced energy monitoring costs by 27% in the first quarter" — GreenGrid Energy CTO

### WashFlow — Business Management Suite
- URL: https://washflow.app
- Status: Active (launched May 2024)
- Users: 8,700 | Companies: 120
- Description: All-in-one management platform for car wash and laundry businesses. Order tracking, scheduling, CRM with loyalty programs, role-based access control.
- Tech: React, Next.js, TypeScript, NestJS, PostgreSQL, React Native, Docker
- Client result: "Went from spreadsheets to managing 120 locations in one platform" — CleanWave Founder

### Accounting — Financial Management
- Status: Active (launched June 2024)
- Users: 6,200 | Companies: 340
- Description: Streamlined accounting for SMBs in Ukraine/Eastern Europe. Multi-currency, automatic VAT, bank sync, 1C/BAS export.
- Tech: React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, AWS
- Client result: "890K+ invoices processed with zero downtime. Saved 40 hours per week" — Finova Partners CFO

### Market — E-Commerce Marketplace
- Status: Beta (launched February 2025)
- Users: 3,400 | Companies: 45
- Description: White-label multi-vendor marketplace. Plugin architecture, split payments, escrow, Elasticsearch search.
- Tech: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis

### LifeSpan — Health Tracking
- Status: Coming Soon (Q3 2025)
- Description: Mobile-first health companion. Privacy-first with on-device ML.
- Tech: React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis

## Technical Expertise

**Languages:** TypeScript, Go, SQL
**Frontend:** React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, React Native
**Backend:** Go (chi, pgx), Node.js, NestJS
**Databases:** PostgreSQL 16, Redis
**Infrastructure:** Docker, Hetzner Cloud, AWS, Caddy, GitHub Actions, Terraform
**AI Integration:** Claude API (Anthropic) — layered approach, model selection by task complexity

## Development Process

8-week MVP cycle:
1. Discovery & Scoping
2. Database-first design
3. API-first development
4. Parallel frontend/backend
5. Testing (80%+ coverage)
6. Security review
7. Docker deployment with CI/CD
8. Launch & iteration

## Team

Senior team based in Kyiv, Ukraine. Average 8+ years of experience:
- Alex Kovalenko — Founder & Lead Developer (full-stack, 8+ years)
- Maria Shevchenko — Frontend Developer (React specialist)
- Dmytro Bondar — Backend Developer (Node.js, databases, cloud)
- Olena Lysenko — UI/UX Designer

## Industries Served

Energy management, logistics & operations, fintech & accounting, job search & HR tech, e-commerce & marketplaces, health & wellness.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What's a typical project timeline?**
Most projects take 4-12 weeks from kickoff to launch, depending on scope.

**How does communication work?**
Shared Slack channel, weekly demo calls, and access to our project management board.

**Can I hire individual developers?**
Yes — our staff augmentation model lets you bring on senior developers one at a time.

**What happens after launch?**
We offer ongoing support and maintenance packages.

**Do you work with startups?**
Absolutely. Flexible engagement models that scale with your budget.
